title: Bocchi Chan
description: A mod that brings a new friendly creature Bocchi from Bocchi the Rock!
body:
![Bocchi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2905bd80045e17580092a9a809f7a51210285f_0.webp)

When you explore, you might need a little companion to accompany you. This mod adds Bocchi Chan, who brings luck to those nearby! To be precise, she grants the luck effect to surrounding players and the resistance effect to her owner within close range.

# Features
- Get her through crafting table. You need 1 light blue, 1 yellow and 4 pink concrete blocks

![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c307c72d72eed307f90bb820e61eb01c08308673.png)
- Interact with her (typically by right-clicking) to open the GUI

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc321f537f546a09083425b3c18c587db79598c6.png)
- Make her your friend
- Make her follow/unfollow you
- Turn on/off her effects

![Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2aaf29ddfc96597b1d26d37b57cd8da4a9c2e3.png)
